reasoning: The interviewer asked about the specific types of data users would be viewing and submitting. The user's response directly revealed IR1 by stating 'I prefer to input and send data by submitting forms,' which matches the hidden implicit requirement IR1 exactly.

The interviewer asked about post-submission behavior (confirmation messages, redirects, etc.), but this did not elicit any of the remaining hidden implicit requirements (IR2 about responsive design, IR3 about light coral background, or IR4 about indian red UI pieces). The user explicitly stated they haven't specified post-submission behavior and suggested asking about interaction method or style preferences instead.

The interviewer asked about visual style preferences, and the user explicitly stated they prefer the global background color to be light coral (IR3) and all UI pieces to be colored indian red (IR4). Both of these hidden implicit requirements were directly revealed by the user's answer.
